value:
Thanks for reaching out, and I'm glad the wired connection is working well for search! I understand the frustration—the remote feature does require your phone and AppleTV to be on the same network, and unfortunately the app can't currently detect devices connected only via ethernet.

Here are your options: you can connect your AppleTV to WiFi in addition to the wired connection (most devices support both simultaneously), or use the physical remote that came with your AppleTV. If you'd prefer to use your phone as the remote and need help setting up dual connectivity, I'm happy to walk you through that—just let me know what model AppleTV you have and I can give you specific steps.
